'''Almak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] member of the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] who welcomed back [[Ben Skywalker]] after he returned from his [[Mission for the Amulet of Kalara|mission]].

{{Char-stub}}
